'''Flerp''' was a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Flerp was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and received his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Flerp remained at the Temple and participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. Administrated by Master [[Ilena Xan]], Flerp faced off against fellow Initiate [[Zrim]] .<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Flerp's name is mistakenly combined with Padawan [[Zrim]]. In the novel, ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', the names of the pairs of Padawans that are about to duel each other are being called by Master [[Ilena Xan]]. Each pair is listed, surname only; i.e. "Flerp, Zrim." and "Page, Glip." Later Xan calls out, "Chizzik, Enwandung-Esterhazy," thus providing the reader with concrete evidence that only surnames were being used.
